name: FLEET
tagline: Distributed software management across 1,000+ remote endpoints

starry.situation: A distributed enterprise needed reliable deployment and management for a large fleet of remote laptops over low‑bandwidth connections.
starry.task: Build a Tivoli‑based platform to manage ~6,000 laptops with software caching, rollback, and state comparison—resilient to poor connectivity.
starry.action:
• Architected distributed software caches and staged updates to minimize bandwidth usage.
  • Implemented rollback & state comparison to ensure predictable outcomes and fast recovery.
  • Automated inventory & compliance checks to keep remote endpoints in policy.
  • Scheduled maintenance windows and delta updates to respect modem‑speed links.
starry.result:
• Enabled reliable management of ~6,000 laptops across remote regions.
  • Reduced failed deployments and desk‑side interventions; improved endpoint compliance.
  • Stabilized update cycles despite constrained links.
starry.return: Significant savings from fewer truck‑rolls and reduced rework; improved compliance posture and endpoint reliability across the fleet.
starry.yield: Demonstrated a manage‑anywhere approach to endpoint operations that prefigured modern edge and over‑the‑air management practices.
